children.heading: Dispute Settlement Understanding
children.label: 1 Dispute Settlement Understanding
children.text: The term “Dispute Settlement Understanding” means the Understanding on Rules and Procedures Governing the Settlement of Disputes referred to in .section 3511(d)(16) of title 19

children.heading: Government of the People’s Republic of China
children.label: 2 Government of the People’s Republic of China
children.text: The term “Government of the People’s Republic of China” means the central Government of the People’s Republic of China and any other governmental entity, including any provincial, prefectural, or local entity and any enterprise that is controlled by the central Government or any such governmental entity or as to which the central Government or any such governmental entity is entitled to receive a majority of the profits.

children.heading: Internationally recognized worker rights
children.label: 3 Internationally recognized worker rights
children.text: The term “internationally recognized worker rights” has the meaning given that term in and includes the right to the elimination of the “worst forms of child labor”, as defined in .section 2467(4) of title 19section 2467(6) of title 19

children.heading: Trade Representative
children.label: 4 Trade Representative
children.text: The term “Trade Representative” means the United States Trade Representative.

children.heading: WTO; World Trade Organization
children.label: 5 WTO; World Trade Organization
children.text: The terms “WTO” and “World Trade Organization” mean the organization established pursuant to the WTO Agreement.

children.heading: WTO Agreement
children.label: 6 WTO Agreement
children.text: The term “WTO Agreement” means the Agreement Establishing the World Trade Organization entered into on .April 15, 1994

children.heading: WTO member
children.label: 7 WTO member
children.text: The term “WTO member” has the meaning given that term in .section 3501(10) of title 19
